title: AI Song Generator – Create Original Songs from Text
excerpt: Use an AI song generator to turn text, lyrics, moods, and prompts into original music for videos, games, ads, podcasts, and personal projects.
content_html:
Open road frequency 01 · Your idea is the ignition

Turn any idea, lyric, or mood into a complete song. Describe the sound in your head, load a starting tape, and let the AI song generator shape the melody, arrangement, rhythm, and voice.

One open road · Four creative exits

Every mile gives your song more direction.

The AI song generator follows more than a genre label. It reads the story, energy, structure, vocal direction, and intended use in your prompt. Follow the highway to see how a simple sentence becomes a track you can shape, compare, keep private, and prepare for a real project.

  1. 01

    Describe the song

    Start with a mood, story, lyric, genre, or scene. Natural language is enough.

  2. 02

    Shape the sound

    Add vocals, instruments, tempo, duration, or an instrumental direction when you want more control.

  3. 03

    Generate and refine

    Create a full track, listen back, then remix the parts that need another turn.

Text to Song

Turn any prompt into a complete track.

Start with a scene, memory, character, or product idea. Add tempo, instruments, vocal character, and emotional direction when you want more control, or leave the route open when you want a fresh surprise.

Lyrics to Song

Shape verses, chorus, mood, and voice.

Bring your own lyrics, mark the verse, chorus, bridge, or final refrain, then guide the genre, singer, pacing, and emotional arc. Regenerate sections or try a completely different performance.

Private Studio

Keep drafts private until you publish.

Save unfinished ideas, organize promising versions, and return when the next line arrives. Your workspace keeps experiments together so every hook can stay focused inside the project.

Commercial Ready

Create music for videos, ads, games, and podcasts.

Build intros, loops, campaign hooks, trailer cues, podcast themes, or full vocal songs around the length and mood your project needs. Paid-plan exports can be used under the applicable commercial license terms.

Pick your lane · Upgrade when ready

A plan for every creative route.

Start with the plan that fits your current pace, then move up when you need more songs, projects, exports, or team support.

Popular

  • Prompt, lyrics, and instrumental modes
  • Remix, replace, extend, vocals, instrumental, and speech tools
  • MP3 playback and downloads
  • Private song history
  • Commercial use under applicable plan terms
  • Priority email support

Use-case highway · Music built around the job

A soundtrack for every kind of maker.

Different projects need different structures, lengths, and levels of control. The AI song generator starts from the job your music must do, then helps you tune genre, energy, vocals, and arrangement without searching through a stock library for something that almost fits.

AI song generator for video creators

Soundtracks paced to the cut.

Describe the scene, platform, length, and emotional turn. The AI song generator can explore intros, background beds, transitions, reveals, and outros for YouTube, TikTok, Reels, Shorts, or long-form edits. Use the AI song generator to find a distinctive musical direction early, then make variations for alternate cuts without restarting the creative search.

AI song generator for game developers

Loops for worlds, levels, and trailers.

Set the environment, player state, intensity curve, and loop length. The AI song generator can sketch menu themes, ambient exploration, battle energy, victory cues, and cinematic trailer ideas. Keep related versions in one project so the AI song generator becomes a fast music concept partner for prototypes, pitches, and production planning.

AI song generator for marketers

Campaign music without the long wait.

Translate a brand mood, product promise, campaign line, or audience insight into musical language. The AI song generator can draft jingles, ad hooks, launch-video beds, sonic logos, and social-ready cuts. Use the AI song generator to compare bold, playful, premium, or understated directions before choosing what should carry the campaign.

AI song generator for songwriters

Turn rough ideas into demos.

Begin with a title, lyric fragment, chord mood, character, or chorus idea. The AI song generator can turn that fragment into a listenable structure that reveals what works and what still needs writing. Let the AI song generator test alternate tempos, genres, vocal colors, and arrangements while you stay in charge of the story and final creative decisions.

Private by default · Clear before you publish

A studio for experiments and usable exports.

The AI song generator keeps drafts organized and private until you choose to share them. Save versions, revisit prompts, and export tracks according to your plan. Commercial usage is available under the applicable license terms, and the AI song generator presents those boundaries clearly so teams can make informed choices before a song enters a client, channel, game, ad, or podcast.

  • Private drafts and project organization
  • Regenerate, remix, extend, and compare versions
  • Download and commercial usage under plan terms

Roadside radio answers

Questions before you press Generate.

The best AI song generator feels simple at the first click and stays transparent when the work becomes serious. These answers cover prompts, lyrics, instrumentals, revisions, and commercial usage so you know what to expect before starting a track.

Can I generate a song from just one sentence?

Yes. Give the AI song generator a scene, mood, topic, genre, or intended use and it can turn that sentence into a complete musical direction. A richer prompt usually gives you more specific results, but you do not need production vocabulary to begin. Start with plain language, listen, and add detail on the next pass.

Can I use my own lyrics?

Yes. Paste your lyrics, label sections when useful, and tell the AI song generator how the performance should feel. You can guide genre, vocal character, tempo, language, mood, and structure. Keep your original wording, revise a single section, or generate a new arrangement around the same lyric idea.

Can I use generated songs commercially?

Commercial usage depends on the plan and the license terms that apply to your export. The AI song generator is designed for videos, ads, games, podcasts, and branded content, but it does not rely on absolute ownership claims. Review the current plan details before publishing or delivering client work.

Can I make instrumental music?

Yes. Ask the AI song generator for an instrumental track, ambient loop, intro, outro, underscore, or cinematic cue. You can name instruments, remove vocals, set an approximate duration, and describe how the energy should change. Instrumental mode is useful when dialogue, voice-over, or gameplay must stay in the foreground.

Can I edit or regenerate a song?

Yes. Use the first AI song generator result as a draft. Regenerate the track, remix the genre, extend a section, shorten the arrangement, change the mood, request another vocal direction, or create an instrumental version. Iteration is the point: each version helps you move from a broad idea toward a song that fits the project.

Next exit · Your first original track

Make songs from a sentence.

Describe your sound, choose a vibe, and let the AI song generator turn the idea into music you can hear, refine, save, and use.

Create your first song

sentences.zh: 使用人工智能歌曲生成器尽早找到独特的音乐方向，然后为替代剪辑进行变体，而无需重新启动创意搜索。

sentences.en: AI song generator for game developers
sentences.zh: 为游戏开发者提供的人工智能歌曲生成器

sentences.en: Loops for worlds, levels, and trailers.

blocks.html_en: Set the environment, player state, intensity curve, and loop length. The AI song generator can sketch menu themes, ambient exploration, battle energy, victory cues, and cinematic trailer ideas. Keep related versions in one project so the AI song generator becomes a fast music concept partner for prototypes, pitches, and production planning.

sentences.en: Set the environment, player state, intensity curve, and loop length.

sentences.en: Keep related versions in one project so the AI song generator becomes a fast music concept partner for prototypes, pitches, and production planning.

blocks.html_en: Translate a brand mood, product promise, campaign line, or audience insight into musical language. The AI song generator can draft jingles, ad hooks, launch-video beds, sonic logos, and social-ready cuts. Use the AI song generator to compare bold, playful, premium, or understated directions before choosing what should carry the campaign.

sentences.zh: 将品牌氛围、产品承诺、活动路线或观众洞察转化为音乐语言。

sentences.en: Use the AI song generator to compare bold, playful, premium, or understated directions before choosing what should carry the campaign.
sentences.zh: 使用人工智能歌曲生成器来比较大胆、有趣、优质或低调的方向，然后再选择该活动的内容。

blocks.html_en: Begin with a title, lyric fragment, chord mood, character, or chorus idea. The AI song generator can turn that fragment into a listenable structure that reveals what works and what still needs writing. Let the AI song generator test alternate tempos, genres, vocal colors, and arrangements while you stay in charge of the story and final creative decisions.

blocks.html_en: The AI song generator keeps drafts organized and private until you choose to share them. Save versions, revisit prompts, and export tracks according to your plan. Commercial usage is available under the applicable license terms, and the AI song generator presents those boundaries clearly so teams can make informed choices before a song enters a client, channel, game, ad, or podcast.

sentences.en: Roadside radio answers
sentences.zh: 路边广播答案

sentences.en: Questions before you press Generate.
sentences.zh: 按“生成”之前的问题。

blocks.html_en: The best AI song generator feels simple at the first click and stays transparent when the work becomes serious. These answers cover prompts, lyrics, instrumentals, revisions, and commercial usage so you know what to expect before starting a track.

sentences.en: The best AI song generator feels simple at the first click and stays transparent when the work becomes serious.
sentences.zh: 最好的人工智能歌曲生成器在第一次点击时感觉很简单，当工作变得严肃时保持透明。

sentences.en: These answers cover prompts, lyrics, instrumentals, revisions, and commercial usage so you know what to expect before starting a track.
sentences.zh: 这些答案涵盖提示、歌词、乐器、修订和商业用途，以便您在开始曲目之前知道会发生什么。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Give the AI song generator a scene, mood, topic, genre, or intended use and it can turn that sentence into a complete musical direction. A richer prompt usually gives you more specific results, but you do not need production vocabulary to begin. Start with plain language, listen, and add detail on the next pass.

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Give the AI song generator a scene, mood, topic, genre, or intended use and it can turn that sentence into a complete musical direction.
sentences.zh: 给人工智能歌曲生成器一个场景、情绪、主题、流派或预期用途，它可以将这句话变成完整的音乐方向。

sentences.en: A richer prompt usually gives you more specific results, but you do not need production vocabulary to begin.
sentences.zh: 更丰富的提示通常会为您提供更具体的结果，但您不需要生产词汇即可开始。

sentences.en: Start with plain language, listen, and add detail on the next pass.
sentences.zh: 从简单的语言开始，倾听，并在下一遍中添加细节。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Paste your lyrics, label sections when useful, and tell the AI song generator how the performance should feel. You can guide genre, vocal character, tempo, language, mood, and structure. Keep your original wording, revise a single section, or generate a new arrangement around the same lyric idea.

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Paste your lyrics, label sections when useful, and tell the AI song generator how the performance should feel.
sentences.zh: 粘贴歌词，在有用时标记部分，并告诉人工智能歌曲生成器表演应该有什么感觉。

sentences.en: You can guide genre, vocal character, tempo, language, mood, and structure.
sentences.zh: 您可以指导流派、声音特征、节奏、语言、情绪和结构。

sentences.en: Keep your original wording, revise a single section, or generate a new arrangement around the same lyric idea.
sentences.zh: 保留原来的措辞，修改单个部分，或围绕相同的歌词想法生成新的安排。

blocks.html_en: Commercial usage depends on the plan and the license terms that apply to your export. The AI song generator is designed for videos, ads, games, podcasts, and branded content, but it does not rely on absolute ownership claims. Review the current plan details before publishing or delivering client work.

sentences.en: Commercial usage depends on the plan and the license terms that apply to your export.
sentences.zh: 商业用途取决于适用于您的出口的计划和许可条款。

sentences.en: The AI song generator is designed for videos, ads, games, podcasts, and branded content, but it does not rely on absolute ownership claims.
sentences.zh: AI 歌曲生成器专为视频、广告、游戏、播客和品牌内容而设计，但它不依赖于绝对所有权声明。

sentences.en: Review the current plan details before publishing or delivering client work.
sentences.zh: 在发布或交付客户工作之前查看当前计划详细信息。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Ask the AI song generator for an instrumental track, ambient loop, intro, outro, underscore, or cinematic cue. You can name instruments, remove vocals, set an approximate duration, and describe how the energy should change. Instrumental mode is useful when dialogue, voice-over, or gameplay must stay in the foreground.

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Ask the AI song generator for an instrumental track, ambient loop, intro, outro, underscore, or cinematic cue.
sentences.zh: 向 AI 歌曲生成器询问乐器曲目、环境循环、前奏、结尾、下划线或电影提示。

sentences.en: You can name instruments, remove vocals, set an approximate duration, and describe how the energy should change.
sentences.zh: 您可以命名乐器、移除人声、设置大致的持续时间，并描述能量应如何变化。

sentences.en: Instrumental mode is useful when dialogue, voice-over, or gameplay must stay in the foreground.
sentences.zh: 当对话、画外音或游戏必须留在前台时，乐器模式非常有用。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Use the first AI song generator result as a draft. Regenerate the track, remix the genre, extend a section, shorten the arrangement, change the mood, request another vocal direction, or create an instrumental version. Iteration is the point: each version helps you move from a broad idea toward a song that fits the project.

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Use the first AI song generator result as a draft.
sentences.zh: 使用第一个 AI 歌曲生成器结果作为草稿。

sentences.en: Regenerate the track, remix the genre, extend a section, shorten the arrangement, change the mood, request another vocal direction, or create an instrumental version.
sentences.zh: 重新生成曲目、重新混合流派、扩展一个部分、缩短编曲、改变情绪、请求另一个声乐方向或创建一个乐器版本。

sentences.en: Iteration is the point: each version helps you move from a broad idea toward a song that fits the project.
sentences.zh: 迭代是重点：每个版本都可以帮助您从广泛的想法转向适合项目的歌曲。

sentences.en: Next exit · Your first original track
sentences.zh: 下一个出口·你的第一首原创曲目

sentences.en: Make songs from a sentence.
sentences.zh: 用一句话创作歌曲。

blocks.html_en: Describe your sound, choose a vibe, and let the AI song generator turn the idea into music you can hear, refine, save, and use.

sentences.en: Describe your sound, choose a vibe, and let the AI song generator turn the idea into music you can hear, refine, save, and use.
sentences.zh: 描述您的声音，选择一种氛围，然后让人工智能歌曲生成器将想法转化为您可以听到、提炼、保存和使用的音乐。

content_html_zh:
开路频率01·你的想法就是点火

将任何想法、歌词或情绪变成一首完整的歌曲。 描述你脑海中的声音，加载起始磁带，然后让 AI 歌曲生成器塑造旋律、编曲、节奏和声音。

描述您想要创作的歌曲

一条开放之路·四个创意出口

每一英里都会给你的歌曲带来更多方向。

人工智能歌曲生成器不仅仅遵循流派标签。 它会读取提示中的故事、能量、结构、声音方向和预期用途。 沿着高速公路，看看一个简单的句子如何成为您可以塑造、比较、保密并为实际项目做好准备的轨道。

  1. 01描述歌曲从情绪、故事、歌词、流派或场景开始。 自然语言就足够了。
  2. 02塑造声音当您需要更多控制时，添加人声、乐器、节奏、持续时间或乐器方向。
  3. 03生成和精炼创建完整的曲目，回听，然后重新混合需要另一轮的部分。

文字转歌曲

将任何提示变成完整的曲目。

从场景、记忆、角色或产品创意开始。 当您想要更多控制时，添加节奏、乐器、声音特征和情感方向，或者当您想要新鲜惊喜时，保持路线畅通无阻。

歌曲歌词

塑造诗句、合唱、情绪和声音。

带上你自己的歌词，标记主歌、副歌、桥段或最后的副歌，然后指导流派、歌手、节奏和情感弧线。 重新生成部分或尝试完全不同的性能。

私人工作室

在发布之前将草稿保密。

保存未完成的想法，组织有前途的版本，并在下一行到达时返回。 您的工作空间将实验集中在一起，以便每个挂钩都可以集中在项目内。

商业就绪

为视频、广告、游戏和播客创作音乐。

根据项目所需的长度和情绪构建前奏、循环、活动挂钩、预告片提示、播客主题或完整的人声歌曲。 付费计划导出可以在适用的商业许可条款下使用。

选择你的车道 · 准备好后升级

每一条创意路线的计划。

从适合您当前节奏的计划开始，然后在需要更多歌曲、项目、导出或团队支持时升级。

适合需要所有音乐和编辑工具而无需每次使用音乐积分的大批量创作者。

无限音乐生成0 音乐积分 · 12,500 工具积分/月

  • 订阅后无限音乐生成
  • 提示、歌词和乐器模式
  • 混音、替换、扩展、人声、乐器和语音工具

用例高速公路 · 围绕工作构建的音乐

适合各种制作者的配乐。

不同的项目需要不同的结构、长度和控制级别。 AI 歌曲生成器从您的音乐必须完成的工作开始，然后帮助您调整流派、能量、声音和编曲，而无需在库存库中搜索几乎适合的内容。

适合视频创作者的 AI 歌曲生成器

配乐节奏与剪辑同步。

描述场景、平台、长度和情感转折。 AI 歌曲生成器可以探索 YouTube、TikTok、Reels、Shorts 或长格式编辑的前奏、背景、过渡、展示和结尾。 使用人工智能歌曲生成器尽早找到独特的音乐方向，然后为替代剪辑进行变体，而无需重新启动创意搜索。

为游戏开发者提供的人工智能歌曲生成器

世界、关卡和预告片的循环。

设置环境、玩家状态、强度曲线和循环长度。 人工智能歌曲生成器可以勾画菜单主题、环境探索、战斗能量、胜利线索和电影预告片创意。 将相关版本保留在一个项目中，以便人工智能歌曲生成器成为原型、推介和生产规划的快速音乐概念合作伙伴。

为营销人员提供的人工智能歌曲生成器

竞选音乐无需漫长等待。

将品牌氛围、产品承诺、活动路线或观众洞察转化为音乐语言。 人工智能歌曲生成器可以起草广告歌曲、广告挂钩、启动视频床、声音徽标和社交剪辑。 使用人工智能歌曲生成器来比较大胆、有趣、优质或低调的方向，然后再选择该活动的内容。

专为词曲作者打造的 AI 歌曲生成器

将粗略的想法转化为演示。

从标题、歌词片段、和弦情绪、人物或合唱想法开始。 人工智能歌曲生成器可以将该片段转换为可听的结构，揭示哪些内容有效，哪些内容仍需要编写。 让人工智能歌曲生成器测试不同的节奏、流派、声音色彩和编曲，而您则负责故事和最终的创意决策。

默认为私有 · 发布前清除

用于实验和可用出口的工作室。

AI 歌曲生成器可让草稿保持井井有条且私密，直到您选择共享它们为止。 根据您的计划保存版本、重新访问提示并导出曲目。 根据适用的许可条款可以进行商业用途，并且人工智能歌曲生成器清楚地显示了这些界限，以便团队可以在歌曲进入客户端、频道、游戏、广告或播客之前做出明智的选择。

  • 私人草案和项目组织
  • 重新生成、重新混合、扩展和比较版本
  • 根据计划条款下载和商业用途

路边广播答案

按“生成”之前的问题。

最好的人工智能歌曲生成器在第一次点击时感觉很简单，当工作变得严肃时保持透明。 这些答案涵盖提示、歌词、乐器、修订和商业用途，以便您在开始曲目之前知道会发生什么。

Can I generate a song from just one sentence?

是的。 给人工智能歌曲生成器一个场景、情绪、主题、流派或预期用途，它可以将这句话变成完整的音乐方向。 更丰富的提示通常会为您提供更具体的结果，但您不需要生产词汇即可开始。 从简单的语言开始，倾听，并在下一遍中添加细节。

Can I use my own lyrics?

是的。 粘贴歌词，在有用时标记部分，并告诉人工智能歌曲生成器表演应该有什么感觉。 您可以指导流派、声音特征、节奏、语言、情绪和结构。 保留原来的措辞，修改单个部分，或围绕相同的歌词想法生成新的安排。

Can I use generated songs commercially?

商业用途取决于适用于您的出口的计划和许可条款。 AI 歌曲生成器专为视频、广告、游戏、播客和品牌内容而设计，但它不依赖于绝对所有权声明。 在发布或交付客户工作之前查看当前计划详细信息。

Can I make instrumental music?

是的。 向 AI 歌曲生成器询问乐器曲目、环境循环、前奏、结尾、下划线或电影提示。 您可以命名乐器、移除人声、设置大致的持续时间，并描述能量应如何变化。 当对话、画外音或游戏必须留在前台时，乐器模式非常有用。

Can I edit or regenerate a song?

是的。 使用第一个 AI 歌曲生成器结果作为草稿。 重新生成曲目、重新混合流派、扩展一个部分、缩短编曲、改变情绪、请求另一个声乐方向或创建一个乐器版本。 迭代是重点：每个版本都可以帮助您从广泛的想法转向适合项目的歌曲。

下一个出口·你的第一首原创曲目

用一句话创作歌曲。

描述您的声音，选择一种氛围，然后让人工智能歌曲生成器将想法转化为您可以听到、提炼、保存和使用的音乐。

Create your first song
